summary: Route `uris` parameter to URL query string per OpenAPI spec instead of JSON body on PUT/DELETE /me/library; loosen stdin guard on save-library-items.
reason: Spotify's spec declares `uris` as `in: query` on both endpoints, but the generated PUT/DELETE handlers route ALL parameters to the JSON body. Result: `Missing required field: uris` HTTP 400 on every save or remove. The save-library-items handler also had an early-return that blocked --stdin invocations despite advertising the flag. Generator-side fix tracked in mvanhorn/cli-printing-press#1275.
validated_outcome: Full round-trip on a-ha 'Take On Me': check-before-save [false] -> save 200 -> check-after [true] -> remove 200 -> check-after [false].
